author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Iterating all 9 design docs from MVP to production quality. Resolving all 13 open questions using PyTorch's approach as reference. Adding: operator overloading (Add/Mul/etc traits), Display/formatting, HuggingFace interop, mixed precision (autocast), performance benchmarks, documentation requirements, API ergonomics for real PyTorch users. Dispatching parallel agents.
